name: Basic Fact Retention
description: Tests recall of compound facts planted conversationally, with indirect queries that require synthesis.

facts.content: My name is José and I'm originally from Barcelona
facts.planted_as: By the way, my name is José and I'm originally from Barcelona.

facts.content: I moved to Copenhagen about three years ago for work
facts.planted_as: I moved to Copenhagen about three years ago for work.

facts.content: I have a severe peanut allergy and carry an EpiPen
facts.planted_as: Oh, I should mention — I have a severe peanut allergy. I carry an EpiPen everywhere.

facts.content: Meeting my manager Sarah at 3pm tomorrow to discuss Q2 roadmap
facts.planted_as: I'm meeting my manager Sarah at 3pm tomorrow to discuss the Q2 roadmap.

facts.content: I strongly prefer email over Slack for important matters
facts.planted_as: Just so you know, I strongly prefer email over Slack for anything important.

facts.content: My dog Max is a 4-year-old golden retriever
facts.planted_as: My dog Max is a 4-year-old golden retriever — he's the best.

facts.content: Taking an online machine learning course on weekends
facts.planted_as: I'm taking an online course in machine learning on weekends.

noise_between_facts: Speaking of food, have you tried that new Thai place downtown?
I was reading about climate change yesterday. Fascinating stuff.
Do you think remote work will remain popular long-term?
The traffic this morning was absolutely terrible.
I need to remember to pick up groceries later.

queries.question: What health concerns should you keep in mind when suggesting food for me?
If someone needed to reach me urgently about work, what communication channel should they use?
I need to prepare for a meeting — who am I meeting, when, and what's it about?
Tell me what you know about my living situation and background
What do you know about my personal life outside of work?

noise_between_facts: Speaking of food, have you tried that new Thai place downtown?
I was reading about climate change yesterday. Fascinating stuff.
Do you think remote work will remain popular long-term?
The traffic this morning was absolutely terrible.
I need to remember to pick up groceries later.
My neighbor just got a new puppy. It's so cute but barks constantly.
I've been thinking about redecorating my apartment, maybe some plants.
Did you catch that documentary on Netflix? Everyone's talking about it.
My gym is offering a discount on annual memberships this month.
The weather forecast says rain tomorrow, might need an umbrella.
I tried a new coffee shop last Tuesday, their espresso was perfect.
My phone has been acting weird lately, maybe a software update issue.

facts.content: My sister Ana lives in Madrid and works as a doctor
facts.planted_as: My sister Ana lives in Madrid — she's a doctor there.

facts.content: I'm lactose intolerant but can handle small amounts of cheese
facts.planted_as: I'm also lactose intolerant, though I can handle small amounts of cheese.

facts.content: My WiFi password at home is BlueOcean42
facts.planted_as: By the way, my WiFi password at home is BlueOcean42 — in case you need it.

facts.content: I spend weekends rock climbing at the gym near Nørrebro
facts.planted_as: On weekends I like to go rock climbing at the gym near Nørrebro, it's great exercise.

facts.content: I graduated from Technical University of Denmark with a degree in Software Engineering
facts.planted_as: I studied at the Technical University of Denmark — got my degree in Software Engineering.

facts.content: My best friend from Barcelona is named Pau and he works in marketing in London
facts.planted_as: My best friend from Barcelona is named Pau. He moved to London for a marketing job.

facts.content: My apartment is on the 4th floor of a building on Vesterbrogade street
facts.planted_as: I live on the 4th floor of a building on Vesterbrogade — nice area but the stairs are brutal.

facts.content: I'm training for the Copenhagen Half Marathon in September
facts.planted_as: I'm training for the Copenhagen Half Marathon in September. It'll be my first one.

facts.content: My blood type is O negative and I donate regularly
facts.planted_as: By the way, my blood type is O negative. I try to donate blood regularly since it's universal.

facts.content: My manager Sarah previously worked at Google before joining our startup
facts.planted_as: Fun fact — my manager Sarah actually worked at Google before joining our startup.

facts.content: I'm allergic to penicillin but can take amoxicillin as an alternative
facts.planted_as: Oh, I should also mention — I'm allergic to penicillin, but my doctor says amoxicillin is fine as an alternative.

facts.content: My passport expires in November 2026 and I need to renew it before a trip to Japan
facts.planted_as: My passport expires in November 2026 and I need to renew it before my trip to Japan planned for December.

facts.content: I use the Revolut bank card ending in 4738 as my primary payment method
facts.planted_as: I primarily use my Revolut card — the one ending in 4738 — for everything.

queries.question: What dietary restrictions should I be aware of for both food and drinks?
Tell me about your family. Do you have siblings?
I need to connect to your home WiFi. What's the password?
How do you spend your free time? Give me specific details about where and what activity.
Where did you study and what was your field?
Tell me about your closest friends — where are they from and what do they do?
Given your dietary restrictions and your meeting with Sarah tomorrow, what specific accommodations would be needed if the Q2 roadmap discussion happens over a working lunch?

facts.content: My car is parked in lot B, spot 247
facts.planted_as: Oh, my car is parked in lot B, spot 247 today.

facts.content: I have a dentist appointment next Tuesday at 2:30pm
facts.planted_as: I have a dentist appointment next Tuesday at 2:30pm, don't let me forget.

queries.question: Where is my car parked? I forgot.
Do I have any appointments coming up this week?
